## 226. Omni-Channel Service

when it comes to service a big customer
pain point is having to repeatedly tell
a story many times working with
different agents means different
experiences for the customer with
omni-channel messaging and hubspot you
don't have to put your customers through
that unnecessary stress you can finally
meet your customers where they are when
they need you
omnichannel messaging a free feature
allows you to connect with customers
across multiple channels on a unified
crm platform this means that you deliver
support on your customers preferred
channels because a conversation is in a
singular thread your support reps don't
need to toggle back and forth between
various systems for example if your
customer starts out their conversations
via chat but later emails in your
service agent can easily and seamlessly
adapt with a click of a button and
because your inbox is connected to the
crm this means all the contacts your
customer provided earlier is preserved
so that your customer receives a
consistent experience
omnichannel messaging ensures you reach
a resolution in one thread on one screen
while connecting with your customers
across multiple channels

## 229. Quickly Build Sophisticated Experiences With Journey Automation ｜ HubSpot Spotlight

Hi, I'm Emma Goldborn and I'm going to
show you journey automation. The
workflows tool in HubSpot is incredibly
powerful for automating individual
marketing operations tasks such as
sending welcome emails, updating contact
properties, and routing leads to sales.
But for larger, more sophisticated
marketing teams who are trying to plan
and build end-to-end customer journeys,
we've built journey automation. Let's
imagine a new segment of customers are
engaging with your brand. We can use
journey automation to guide them from
their initial touch point to becoming
marketing qualified leads. Let's use one
of our pre-built templates in journey
automation. This view clearly shows at a
high level the different stages or
automated flows and paths that a contact
can take through the journey based on
their intent level. I can also clearly
see the overall goal of my journey which
is to turn my contacts into qualified
leads. Depending on their engagement at
each stage, contacts will take the path
that is most relevant to them. This view
makes it really easy for me to
understand the different experiences my
contacts are having and make adjustments
as needed. Now that we've seen the
overall journey, let's zoom in on the
new contact
stage. We've tailored the automation
building experience specifically for
marketers needs. We've removed the
complexities of branching logic in
workflows, making it incredibly easy to
tailor your communication based on how
your customers interact with your
content. For example, if they showed
interest in a particular product
category on our website, we'll
automatically send them a targeted email
with relevant resources and customer
success stories. This personalized
follow-up shows that we care and sets
the stage for a strong relationship.
Now, let's go back to my
journey. I've taken the template and
customized it to fit my needs, and I can
continue to add to it as my contacts
engage with it more. Now, I'm ready to
turn it
on. Once I turn the journey on, I have
access to real-time analytics.
This means you can make datadriven
adjustments to help drive conversion and
engagement. It's all about continuous
improvement. Our Journey Analytics
allows you to pinpoint areas where
you're losing leads in the funnel. For
example, we can see here that 20% of my
leads are dropping out at this step of
the funnel. We can create targeted
re-engagement campaigns to bring them
back into the fold. And if you're
already using our customer journey
reports, this gets even better. We
automatically generate those reports for
each stage of the journey. You can
easily dig in and explore to see exactly
what's working and what's not within
each stage. Make every moment with your
customers count and shrink months of
work into minutes with Journey
Automation. Visit
hubspot.com/spotlight to see all the
latest updates.

## 245. Segments And Personalization ｜ HubSpot Spotlight Fall 2025

Discover high-value audience segments
with AI that identifies who's ready to
buy. Build segments easily, all in one
place. No developer skills needed. AI
shows you the audiences you should
actually care most about, then let you
create personalized website variants,
landing pages, and CTAs for each
segment, delivering experiences that
actually convert.
Design unique journeys for your
visitors. From industry specific
messaging to personalized offers based
on behavior.
Watch conversion rates climb as the
right messages reach the right person at
the right time. It's everything you need
to organize audiences and personalize
content so your whole team can do
advanced targeting.
Stop the one-sizefits-all approach and
start giving people what they're truly
looking for.

---

## 246. Self-Generating CRM Data ｜ HubSpot Spotlight Fall 2025

With self-generating CRM, your CRM works
in the background so your team can focus
on what matters. AI automatically
enriches every contact and company
record with data from conversations, the
web, and HubSpot's data set.
Conversational enrichment captures
details from every email and call.
Nothing falls through the cracks. Smart
properties answer your custom business
questions, filling unique fields with
insights pulled from across the
internet. Watch as job changes, company
news, and contact updates flow in
automatically. No manual research or
data entry required. Your data grows
with you, staying accurate and
actionable as your business scales.
Every record gets smarter with each
interaction, building complete customer
intelligence that flows seamlessly
across HubSpot. Let AI handle the
tedious work of keeping your customer
data current. Focus on using the
insights to reach customers and build
relationships.

---

## 249. Service Hub Reinvented (Teaser)

The old way of support and success is
broken.
Two separate solutions is no solution at
all.
More reps and more budget? Not a chance.
Not happening. So, we created a better
way. Introducing the all-new AI-powered
Service Hub from HubSpot.
With success and support together in one
place for the first time ever.
Scale your support team with an
AI-powered help desk and resolve common
customer questions instantly, 24/7.
Drive proactive retention with the
customer success workspace.
Know how your customers are feeling and
how they are using your products at a
glance with their overall health score.
Maintain a full 360 customer view all on
one powerhouse smart CRM. So, marketing,
sales, and service can go to market as
one unstoppable, unified team. Scale
support, drive retention, all in one
place.

---

## 250. Smart Insights ｜ HubSpot Spotlight Fall 2025

Smart Insights proactively analyzes your
CRM data and identifies what's
important, what's changed, and what to
do next. Leave manual report digging
behind. Smart Insights flag critical
trends and summarize your next best
actions. Instant summaries turn meeting
transcripts and email threads into
actionable insights. Column insights
explain any data pattern with a simple
right click. Smart Digest notifications
alert you the moment performance shifts
or important trends emerge across your
business. From customer health scores to
pipeline risks, Smart Insights ensures
nothing important slips through the
cracks. Your data has answers. Smart
Insight finds them. Get started today.

---

Customer Agent is an AI agent. It's an

question,

instead of putting them on hold or
connecting them to a human
representative, Customer Agent is going
to instantly connect with your
third-party systems and provide a
personalized response right away. So
whether it's checking an order status or
resetting your password, it's going to
handle these requests automatically,
freeing up your support team for more
complex support needs. And Customer
Agent should be up-to-date with your
latest information. So you can easily

public URLs,
PDFs, HubSpot content such as knowledge
base, website, and blogs. But even

to meet your customers where they are.

## 266. Sprout Social HubSpot Integration

the hubspot app marketplace is home to
more than 1 000 integrations that span
use cases in marketing sales service and
more
customers rely on integrations to grow
their business
integrations reduce complexity by
bringing disparate tools together which
allows hubspot to act as a single source
of truth for customers
one of the integrations available in the
hubspot app marketplace is sprout social
a social media management platform that
offers solutions for social marketing
customer service and more
as a part of sprout's care features you
can create and delegate tasks for your
customer care team by connecting hubspot
and sprout your social and support teams
can create track manage and resolve
issues without leaving the app they are
working on let's see how it works
the first step is installing the
integration go to the settings of your
sprout account click on integrations and
select hubspot
you are now ready to link existing
hubspot contacts and social profiles
from sprout go to the smart inbox of
your sprout account once you click on a
user profile or reply to a message
sprout will display the hubspot contact
associated with the social profile on
the side menu
click the button to link them
if sprout can't find a hubspot contact
associated with the social profile you
can search it by name email or social
handle
for those social media users who are not
hubspot records yet click on create
contact
from there on whenever you update this
contact's data in hubspot or sprout
you'll have that change available in the
other app which means your data will
stay up to date across systems
another feature of the hubspot and
sprout integration is the ability to
view create edit and comment on hubspot
tickets from sprout to make
communications more efficient and
provide greater visibility
after you've linked a hubspot contact to
a social profile in sprout you'll see
all the hubspot tickets associated with
that contact in sprout's smart inbox
create new tickets directly from
sprout's smart inbox by clicking the
plus button under the section hubspot
tickets
there you can fill out the information
for subject category priority contact
and description
after clicking on create ticket you'll
have it available within your hubspot
tickets
edit from hubspot or sprout and add
comments for your support team directly
from sprout
to learn more and get started visit the
hubspot app marketplace

## 268. Store Sensitive Data in HubSpot Smart CRM

successful businesses thrive on data to
drive growth and Delight customers
however when it comes to sensitive data
many organizations struggle to
effectively and safely make use of it
thankfully HubSpot provides a secure
solution for storing sensitive customer
data within the smart CRM this enables
businesses like yours to utilize this
data to fuel your growth manage
compliance and mitigate potential
disruptions here's how it works Begin by
activating the sensitive data settings
in your portal here you'll select the
types of sensitive data you plan to
store such as personal financial or
medical data in case of the latter
you'll be prompted to State whether you
are a HIPPA covered entity or need a
business associate agreement in order to
comply with this United States data
Protection Law once this is turned on
you can start storing sensitive data in
HubSpot smart CRM to do so simply create
a property and designate it as sensitive
what this does is add an extra layer of
encryption for all data stored within it
also ensures that only authorized users
are able to view the data that it stores
now that you have a secure place for
your sensitive data you can use these
sensitive properties more or less like
any other property in HubSpot smart CRM
with a few exceptions meaning you can
now safely use sensitive data to power
your automations campaigns and
interactions and to light your customers
with an exceptionally personalized
experience if you want to know more
about hubs SWAT sensitive data software
like what types of sensitive data you
can store in hubs SWAT and where you can
or cannot use it please refer to our
sensitive data terms or visit our trust
Center

---

Hey sales teams, it's Nick from HubSpot
Academy.
I'm here to introduce you to the brand
new prospecting workspace in Sales Hub.
Why? Well, many sales reps today are
struggling to hit targets and spending
too much time on tasks that aren't
related to selling.
And as a result, teams have developed a
productivity problem, which has led to a
gap in their connections with customers.
It's more important now than ever for
sales reps to learn how to maximize
their opportunities by reaching the
right prospects with the right message.
And that's where HubSpot's new
prospecting workspace comes in.
The prospecting workspace is crafted to
empower your sales reps and boost
productivity. It offers a seamless and
efficient experience, helping you
achieve your goals effortlessly, all in
one place.
From scheduling and task management to
sequences and leads, everything is
readily available at your fingertips.
The best part?
Sales reps alike no longer have to
switch between apps to complete their
work. You now have a singular view of
your work, so you can concentrate on
what truly matters. Engaging prospects
and building pipeline by focusing on the
human connection.
So, let's take a look at how this works.
In the workspace, you'll see your
personal schedule, daily goal tracker,
leads, sequences, contacts, email
replies, and outstanding tasks all in
one place. The great thing, you can get
straight to work by clicking any link.
It'll open a task queue, so you can stay
focused on one type of task without
distractions.
You can also measure how far along you
are for the day, get suggested actions
to take, and know when contacts are
assigned to you or they've replied.
And this isn't just for tasks and
calendars. With the addition of new lead
management tools, reps have a space for
managing leads with ease.
Leads smoothly progress through stages
reps engage, saving time on manual
tasks, and allowing more time for
customer interactions.
How?
Reach out to one lead and their status
will automatically change from new to
attempting. And if they respond, it says
connected.
If you qualify them, it'll automatically
open a deal creation window.
Or if it didn't work out, a window will
open where you can select why this lead
was disqualified.
This makes it easy to report on your
leads, maintain data integrity, and get
consistency baked into your sales
process.
Okay, so let's talk about your schedule.
We all know that when you're on top of
your schedule, your productivity
skyrockets. Luckily, the workspace makes
it easy for you to optimize your
schedule. Simply connect your calendar
to HubSpot and you'll be able to manage
your schedule right from inside the
workspace. It'll highlight contacts
you're meeting with each day, so you can
quickly review their needs and history.
It'll even suggest when you should block
time to go through your tasks and remind
you to update the CRM with your meeting
notes and outcomes.
So, what if we were to combine the new
elements of prospecting and the
importance of the calendar together?
Now, as you're moving leads through your
stages, prospecting sales reps can
capitalize on that momentum gained from
a successful qualifying call and easily
schedule the discovery call on the
account manager's calendar.
And in Sales Hub Professional, you can
set up meeting rotations and distribute
leads evenly across your team.
Finally, we know prospecting doesn't
just happen at a desk. With the HubSpot
mobile app, you never have to stop
generating revenue, even when you're on
the road or at a conference. Quickly
scan a business card, QR code, or import
VCards to add new contacts and
immediately roll them into a sequence
right from your phone. You can
orchestrate, review, and send
personalized sales emails with content
assistant and avoid the hassle of typing
on your phone.
Be sure to check out the brand new Sales
Hub, so you can lessen your admin work
and stop treating a prospect like
ticking a box, and instead boost your
prospecting productivity and focus on
closing that connection gap with your
customers.

conversations.

## 292. Turn Customer Challenges Into Wins With Help Desk Workspace ｜ HubSpot Spotlight

When it comes to providing world-class
support, every second counts. You need
more than just tools. You need speed.
That's where HubSpot's help desk
workspace comes in. The fastest way to
turn customer challenges into winning
moments. Get ready to see support that's
built for speed, powered by AI, and
designed to close tickets lightning
fast. Let's start with the agent
experience. Watch how AI transforms
ticket management from the moment a
ticket lands in your system. Let's take
a look at our AI generated ticket
naming. Instead of generic titles, you
get precise contextrich names that
immediately clarify the issue. Check out
the new AI powered knowledge sources
sidebar card. As soon as a ticket comes
in, it's recommending relevant help
content. No more endless searching. The
right information comes to you. And the
summary card makes it easy to see any
progress on the ticket so far, helping
with smooth handoffs between agents. Now
imagine support tickets that
automatically capture all the important
details. Our new AI generated ticket
properties, including sentiment,
category, and language, transform
scattered customer conversations into
clear, actionable insights. These
properties can be used in workflows,
reports, custom views, and more, helping
you to understand what your customers
really need and prioritize the most
urgent issues. its support made smarter,
faster, and easier. CX leaders, this is
where you'll gain a ton of visibility.
The summary tab gives you an instant
overview of what's critical right now.
And the analyze tab gives you a
comprehensive life cycle view of every
ticket. Our new journey analytics lets
you visualize exactly where customers
are struggling and how tickets are being
created and closed, giving you insight
you've never had before. It's gotten a
whole lot simpler to deliver complex
support. With the custom channels API,
omni channel is a reality. You can use
spaces to organize large, intricate
support teams. You can also split
multi-issue tickets with a single click
and set individual ticket capacity
limits to prevent reps from getting
overwhelmed. We packed in efficiency
boosters like a conbon style board
layout for visual ticket management, AI
powered reply recommendations to
accelerate responses, drafts for
seamless team collaboration, and
expanded send options to give your team
ultimate flexibility. Imagine support
that doesn't just solve problems, but
accelerates the entire customer
experience. That's the help desk
workspace in action. Visit
hubspot.com/spotlight to learn more.

## 296. UNBOUND 2026： The Signals Are Undeniable

The rhythm of business has changed.
You hear it over and over again.
The signals are undeniable.
But if the blueprint is gone,
what comes next?
A new signal goes out, heard by
those in pursuit of something bigger.
A bolder community gathers together,
unafraid of bridging the gap between the
impossible and possible.
Untapped in its potential,
ready to break ground,
unstoppable together,
driving forward into the future.
Join us in a new era of growth, unbound
by rules, unbound by limits.
Unbound.

## 297. Unify Snowflake and HubSpot Data with Data Studio

Personalizing your campaigns is tough
when your customer data is scattered
across multiple platforms. That's why
the Snowflake AI data cloud extends
beyond data sync with HubSpot's all-new
data studio. With the Snowflake
integration for HubSpot, you can
combine, enhance, and activate customer
data without any complexity. Build
sophisticated segments using behavioral
and CRM data. Trigger workflows that
turn product usage into upgrade
opportunities automatically. Prove
marketing's impact with advanced
attribution, connecting campaigns to
revenue. Empower your team and AI tools
with unified customer insights that
deliver accurate outputs. Go from manual
spreadsheet work to automated insights
where data chaos becomes data clarity.
Get started with the Snowflake
integration with HubSpot's Data Studio.

## 302. What Is HubSpot CRM？ ｜ Introduction

here at hubspot we're obsessed with the
idea of thinking of companies as
flywheels so your marketing and sales
teams work together to attract people to
you and your sales team then engages
with those people to figure out if you
can meet their needs and then you
delight them with the solution you give
them and with your services team service
so much so that they go out and attract
more people to you and it becomes this
virtuous cycle where growth accelerates
and becomes easier in order to pull this
off you've got to have your teams
delivering a seamless experience to your
customers at every stage of that
flywheel and in order to do that you
need a crafted solution that works
across all your teams and that's where
hubspot comes in we've built hubspot to
help you deliver these seamless
experiences and it all starts with our
core crm functionalities so in hubspot
you can track several things you have
contacts to keep track of the people
that you're working with and companies
for the organizations that they work at
and these are organized into tables you
can create different properties and
filter and sort these records to keep
track of whatever it is you need to
track for your business to succeed in
addition to contacting companies which
track these real entities out in the
world people and organizations there are
also deals and tickets which are a
little bit different deals are for your
sales in progress and you can move a
deal through your pipeline visually from
one stage to the next until it's closed
and same with tickets so deals and
tickets you can organize into the same
kind of table that we saw contacts and
companies in but it's more fun to have
them in a board view so here's a deal
pipeline keeping track of sales that are
in a sales process and you can drag and
drop them as they move from one stage to
the next and these contacts companies
deals and tickets will be used by all of
your teams you don't have separate
databases for separate teams they're all
pulling from that same core crm
functionality built on top of this core
crm functionality are different hubs for
each of your teams so we have marketing
hub with things like emails and social
media and we have sales hub to help you
schedule meetings and and make phone
calls and deliver quotes and we've got
service hub with a unified inbox for
your conversations and feedback surveys
and other things to help your service
team grow in the background we've got
cms hub so you can build functional
beautiful websites to attract those
people to you and we've got operations
hub to give you deeper analytics and
automation and each of these suites of
tools has been built to work together we
have automation and reporting features
that cut across all these hubs to give
you unified data so if you want to use a
marketing hub email to send a service
hub survey to your sales contacts after
they've had a consultation or a demo you
can do that and all that data will feed
into the same location so you can report
on how well your process is working and
as though that's not enough we have
hundreds of integrations available in
our marketplace so the other tools
you're using in addition to hubspot can
share data with hubspot so if your sales
team is using sales hub to book meetings
with their contacts you can add meeting
links directly into the location of the
calendar invite that gets sent all of
this works right inside of hubspot by
design out of the box it's free to get
started so sign up today and it's easy
to start small you can install our
integration with outlook or gmail to
start tracking your sales reps emails
and getting those records logged in crm
contact records and company records will
get created automatically your sales
team can start sending out meeting links
to book time with people so find little
ways to integrate hubspot into your
current process and see how it goes
bye

## 307. Why Leverage Business Units？

companies managing multiple Brands need
organized yet Integrated Systems for
example marketers need ways to delineate
between marketing assets but also to
share contacts that allow for cross-sell
opportunities luckily HubSpot customers
can feel confident managing different
brand assets contacts and data from a
single portal introducing business units
business units is an add-on that allows
you to create and manage up to 100
brands from one HubSpot portal available
to those with marketing Hub Enterprise
customers can run branded campaigns for
different audiences
manage communication preferences between
Brands and report on each Brand's
performance
in other words business units enables
marketers to do their best work across
brands from one HubSpot portal let's
explore how it works creating campaigns
across Brands requires organization
between assets rather than relying on
Long naming conventions business units
allow you to tag and organize your
assets by brand available for HubSpot
forms emails web pages landing pages
blog posts and more navigating to the
right asset will feel seamless running
branded campaigns doesn't have to
involve hours of list building or data
manipulation leverage the business
unit's property to assign and organize
contacts by brand rather than adding
hidden form fields to tag contacts the
business unit's property will
automatically associate contacts to the
right brand
for marketing is working across Brands
implementing the right colors and logos
can take time with business units you
can streamline your content creation
process by creating brand kits with
relevant logos colors and website themes
this will make it easier to carry each
brand identity across campaign assets
finally business units allow you to
manage subscriptions across Brands
create subscription types or preference
Pages for each brand so that customers
can opt in to the right content this way
you can keep your Communications
relevant and customer experience
exceptional
say goodbye to implementing complex
workarounds to customize a single
HubSpot instance with business units you
can confidently manage contacts assets
and settings across multiple brands
